title: Attendance Clocked In Event
description: A worker was clocked in on a target timekeeping system. Orwell should emit this after a successful clock-in, whether triggered by a toggle or an explicit command.

clock_system.description: Timekeeping integration or system that accepted the clock-in, for example 'orwell'.

principal.description: Logical worker or account identifier that is now clocked in.

effective_at.description: Timestamp when the clock-in took effect according to the emitting system.

source_command_id.description: command_id of the originating attendance command, if this event was caused by one.

trigger.description: Which command form produced this event. Null if the system cannot determine it.
